# Redacted provider fixtures

These payloads are small contract fixtures for provider normalization. They retain the
field names and nesting used by the observed Ctrip international calendar and detailed
search response families. Identifiers, flight numbers, names, dates, and prices are
synthetic replacements; no cookies, request headers, browser profile data, or user data
are present.

The fixtures prove only the fields asserted by tests. In particular, they do not claim
verified semantics for baggage, refund/change rules, on-time performance, or the
`directFlight` request flag.
